logs.label: UI
logs.title: Polished the developer time log, defaulted the system to light mode, and locked down the source
logs.body: I rebuilt the developer time log so it always has its history available and gave it a cleaner, more professional look. I set the whole system to open in light mode by default and added a quick light/dark switch right next to the clock in the header. I tightened the Settings page into a two-column layout so there's far less scrolling, and I hardened the production build so the code can't easily be read from the browser.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Implemented the full requested feature set across the system
logs.body: For Orders I added a staff search inside the assign dropdown, filtering and pagination for the order pool, and proper rules so order type, channel, payment and fulfillment always make sense together — walk-ins are paid at the counter, the Next button stays disabled until there's data, and closing a half-filled order asks for confirmation. I removed the Refund option entirely. I added a Payment History section to Pending Payment with timestamps and CSV export, moved the inventory snapshot to the top of the dashboard, and let admins upload item images in both grid and table views with green/amber/red stock-status colors. I added pagination and date/account filters to the general ledger, created an Inventory Manager role that only sees inventory, and built the backup system to email a full JSON backup, wipe everything safely, and restore from an uploaded file behind a strong confirmation. I also made reservations convertible into live orders with their own history and export, and made forecasting cover every item.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed the production build so it runs on the latest tooling
logs.body: I pinned the deployment to Node 20 so the latest build tools work correctly when the system is deployed.

logs.label: SETUP
logs.title: Updated the build tooling
logs.body: I updated our build tooling to the latest version.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Ran a full 141-point quality audit
logs.body: I went through a 141-point quality audit across the whole system and consolidated everything into the project documentation.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Added a Chart of Accounts table
logs.body: I added a Chart of Accounts table to accounting and let admins delete empty accounts.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Documented the latest audit pass
logs.body: I wrote up the latest audit pass in the project documentation.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Wired up Inventory CSV import and Print Labels
logs.body: I connected the Inventory CSV import and Print Labels buttons so nothing is a dead end anymore.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed the release flow and live accounting balances
logs.body: I fixed the order release flow and made the accounting balances update in real time.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Full-system polish pass — Antipolo rebrand and presence dots
logs.body: I did a full-system pass: rebranded everything to Antipolo, polished the Settings page, and added presence-aware status dots so you can see which employees are online.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Improved page scrolling inside tabs
logs.body: I improved the scrolling so content stays neatly contained within its tabs.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Updated the Help page and fixed display issues
logs.body: I refreshed the Help page and cleaned up several display issues.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Enhanced features across multiple pages
logs.body: I enhanced features and fixed display issues across several pages of the system.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed accounting errors and improved the PDF export
logs.body: I fixed errors on the accounting page and improved the PDF export.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Improved the in-app tutorial
logs.body: I improved the in-app tutorial and fixed various page display issues.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed broken tutorial steps and polished the UI
logs.body: I repaired broken tutorial steps and polished a number of UI elements.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Fixed the order pool, locked the announcement voice, and built forecasting
logs.body: I fixed the order pool and the unassign flow, locked the announcement voice to a single voice system-wide, and built demand and revenue forecasting using an ARIMA model on real sales history.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Improved order-assignment notifications
logs.body: I improved the order-assignment notifications and fixed a batch of bugs.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Improved dark mode and voice compatibility
logs.body: I improved dark mode and the voice announcements so they behave consistently across different environments.

logs.label: FIX
logs.title: Fixed text-to-speech for notifications
logs.body: I fixed the text-to-speech for spoken notifications.

logs.label: DOCS
logs.title: Wrote a guide to keep the docs in sync
logs.body: I wrote a comprehensive internal guide so the documentation stays in sync with what's actually shipped.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Built the animated boot loader, logo, and README
logs.body: I built the animated boot loader, designed the JOAP logo, and wrote the project README.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: Stability pass — error boundary, tutorial spotlight, empty states
logs.body: I did a stability pass: added an error boundary, overhauled the tutorial with a focused spotlight, and polished the empty states throughout the app.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Enhanced order management with detailed logging
logs.body: I enhanced order management with comprehensive logging and richer payment details.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Updated order processing and dashboard statistics
logs.body: I updated the order processing and the statistics shown on the dashboard.

logs.label: FEATURE

logs.body: I added comprehensive payment processing and real-time updates to orders.

logs.label: SETUP

logs.body: I moved the database connection string into secure secret storage.

logs.label: UI
logs.title: UX polish — header, inventory edit, daily sales goal, exports
logs.body: I did a UX polish pass: cleaned up the header, added inventory editing, a daily sales goal, a peak-hours export, a user-log target picker, and a cleaner employee modal.

logs.label: FIX

logs.body: I fixed the local server boot on Windows and an offers query bug.

logs.label: UI

logs.body: I adopted the definitive UI design across the dashboard, inventory, charts, heatmap, KPI cards and page headers.

logs.label: UI

logs.body: I overhauled the UI with a modern slate-and-amber theme, a new font, breadcrumbs, a live clock, an appearance tweaks panel, and a quick command shortcut.

logs.label: FEATURE

logs.body: I shipped a big feature update: a new About page, an admin orders view, a floating calculator, a Pending Payment nav, a calendar for the system logs, user deactivation, reservation deletion, duplicate-offer checks, and a set of settings fixes.

logs.label: FEATURE
logs.title: Built the order assignment system
logs.body: I built the order assignment system with voice announcements, task locking, and a three-step processing lifecycle.

logs.body: I fixed startup errors, added an accounting PDF export with charts, and hardened the database connection.

logs.body: I cleaned up the repository by keeping local asset drops out of version control.

logs.body: I enabled text-to-speech playback for order confirmations.

logs.body: I improved the loading speed by fixing server errors and the live-reload connections.
